posts.text: Many point to the “Mediterranean diet”—fish, whole grains, fresh fruit, vegetables and olive oil. Critics, though, point out that diets differ widely from Portugal to Greece https://www.economist.com/europe/2024/06/20/why-southern-europeans-will-soon-be-the-longest-lived-people-in-the-world?taid=6a1e92342b694b0001502f5a&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
Correct. And just like the shale boom, the entire industry is stuck in a prisoner’s dilemma where every player must keep spending or risk beeing seen as a laggard in the race to zero

If you want to visualize the next decade of big tech returns, just plot the $xle from 2012 - 2021
